---
species: "Libinia emarginata"
accepted_code: "LIEM"
alternate_codes: ["LIER", "LIBS"]
diminutive: 
alternate_diminutives: 
common_name: "Common/portly spider crab"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Oval carapice with 9 spines down midrib of top. Use LIBS if you cannot distinguish species."
image: '/header_images/Libinia_emarginata.jpeg'
image_credit: 'Photo by Robert Bachand via [Chesapeake Bay Program](https://www.chesapeakebay.net/discover/field-guide/entry/common-spider-crab)' 
categories:
  - crustaceans
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_swath
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "158426"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
